case_title: VERONICA GONZALEZ VS. AMERICAN FINANCIAL SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-12-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-28-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, VERONICA DBA GONZALEZ CONCRETE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN FINANCIAL SERVICES THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY THE PARTIES WAS CONFLICTING AND NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, VERONICA DBA GONZALEZ CONCRETE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FINANCIAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, VERONICA DBA GONZALEZ CONCRETE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, VERONICA DBA GONZALEZ CONCRETE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FINANCIAL SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-23-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FINANCIAL SERVICES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
